name: Potage De Ble ( Corn Soup)
recipeIngredient: Frozen may be used if out of season
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, bring water to a boil.
2. Add milk, corn, and salt; cook just until corn is tender.
3. Strain cooking liquid into a bowl and set aside the corn.
4. Heat butter in the same saucepan and sauté celery, onion, and leek until softened.
5. Blend in flour; cook until bubbly.
6. Stir in reserved corn cooking liquid. Bring to a boil.
7. Partially cover and let simmer for 15 to 20 minutes.
8. Place corn and liquid in a food processor or blender and puree in batches until smooth.
9. Return to saucepan and add cream. Adjust seasonings with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Reheat until piping hot. SERVES: 4-6
